summary: Mamdani leads strongly in 4-way general election polls (43-46% vs Cuomo 24-28%), but head-to-head with Cuomo is tighter (48-44). CP is exactly at 91.00% threshold with 133 forecasters.
content:
Key polling data (Sep 9-10, 2025):
- Emerson College poll: Mamdani 43%, Cuomo 28%, Sliwa 10%, Adams 7% (4-way)
- Siena/NYT poll: Mamdani 46%, Cuomo 24%, Sliwa 15%, Adams 9% (4-way)  
- Siena/NYT head-to-head: Mamdani 48%, Cuomo 44% (tight)
- CP on underlying question: exactly 91.00% as of Sep 15
- 133 forecasters
- Election: Nov 4, 2025 (~7 weeks away from resolution date)
- No prediction market data found on Polymarket or Manifold
